headline: Celestica Focuses on Margin Expansion: Can it Sustain This Momentum?
summary: CLS drives margin expansion through AI, cloud and high-value hardware. Can its shift to complex solutions sustain rising profitability?

headline: Jabil (JBL) Shares Up Significantly Since Jim Cramer ‘Blessed” the Firm
